title: 38mm Long Shackle Padlock with Keys High-Security Lock for Outdoor Use Ideal for Shed, Gym, Warehouse, Garage, Garden Gate, and Fence Storage Unit, Toolbox, Trailer
features: 【Package Include】You will get 1 pack padlocks with 2 keys. The length of the extended padlocks with keys outdoor can meet multiple applications

【Padlock Outdoor Size】Shackle diameter-5mm, Lock width-38mm, Total height-70mm. With a compact 38mm size, these waterproof padlocks outdoor are great for securing doors, gates, toolboxes, cabinets and even luggage during travel

【Material】 Gate padlock is made of alloy material chrome plated outside with hardened shackle, smooth surface,thick lock body, wear resistance, provides safety protection for your valuables. Locker shed padlock with keys are durable enough to use for a long time, and the garage lock will not be damaged by the sun

【Weatherproof Long Padlock】 The long shackle padlock with keys design ensures shed padlock can withstand even the harsh weather conditions. The extended locks for sheds feature sturdy construction and weather-resistant materials, making gate lock with key ideal for outdoor use
【Widely used】 The large padlock and key can be widely used for shed gate, fence gate, school, employee, gym & sports locker, case, toolbox, gate, hasp cabinet storage and etc
